implemented: single in-order tiny fetch/execute state machine
interrupt inputs reflected as pending level only
not_implemented: caches, coherence, atomics, compressed instructions, floating point, vector

required_before_linux_claim: pinned Chipyard checkout with recursive submodule SHAs

required_isa: privileged architecture suitable for current Linux
vector or documented AI/media offload alternative
required_platform: IOMMU or documented DMA isolation story
interrupt controller topology accepted by Linux
DRAM controller/PHY path with ECC or documented reliability target
DVFS, idle states, reset, debug, and power-domain control
secure boot and measured firmware handoff

deltas.current: one tiny non-Linux scaffold hart; selected import starts with one Rocket hart
deltas.phone_target: at least four coherent application harts with phone-suitable performance/power topology

deltas.current: no CSR file, privilege modes, delegation, trap vector, or return path
deltas.selected_step: Rocket privileged implementation must be generated and proven by trap transcript
deltas.phone_target: Linux-current privileged architecture coverage with exception, interrupt, debug, and virtualization policy documented

deltas.current: 32-bit AXI-Lite accesses into a small DRAM model; no MMU/cache/coherence
deltas.selected_step: generated Rocket MMU/cache path plus simulator evidence
deltas.phone_target: coherent multi-level cache hierarchy, DMA coherence, IOMMU/isolation, DRAM QoS, and memory stress evidence

deltas.current: interrupt inputs are pending-level placeholders only
deltas.selected_step: CLINT/ACLINT and PLIC-compatible generated platform with trap/timer/IRQ transcript
deltas.phone_target: Linux-accepted interrupt topology for SMP, wake, power management, and peripheral MSI-style needs

deltas.current: no firmware handoff, OpenSBI, Linux, or Android boot on generated AP
deltas.selected_step: OpenSBI and Linux early console on generated Rocket AP
deltas.phone_target: Android boot with BSP, SELinux, HAL, storage, display, input, radio-adjacent integration evidence

deltas.current: no DVFS, idle, thermal, reset-domain, or reliability model in CPU/AP path
deltas.selected_step: not closed by single Rocket bring-up; must stay outside Linux AP completion claim
deltas.phone_target: phone thermal envelope, DVFS/idle states, reset recovery, watchdog, RAS, and production telemetry
